utility_evaluation.REASONING:

6. ADDITIONAL_SERVICES: ✓ Fully specified - Meal services are detailed with venue options, price ranges, and total meal budget (€175).

7. TOTAL_BUDGET: ✓ Fully specified - Complete cost breakdown provided showing flights (€120), accommodation (€360), activities (€115), meals (€175), total (€770), and budget remaining (€130).

All 7 items from the required format are present and fully specified with all necessary details including costs.
